subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, Thou Lord of all things and Creator of names! I beseech Thee by the breezes of Thy Revelation and the fragrances of Thine inspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا مالک الاشیاء و خالق الاسماء اسئلک بنفحات وحیک و فوحات الهامک و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
